Package neqsim.process.chemistry.scavenger

Class PackedBedScavengerReactor

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.chemistry.scavenger.PackedBedScavengerReactor
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class PackedBedScavengerReactor extends Object implements Serializable
One-dimensional plug-flow packed-bed model for liquid H2S scavenger contactors.

Models a vertical packed bed loaded with a solid scavenger (typically iron-oxide pellets or triazine-impregnated alumina) that progressively saturates as the H2S-laden hydrocarbon stream passes through it. The bed is discretised axially into N cells; each cell tracks the remaining active scavenger inventory and depletes proportionally to local H2S consumption.

Governing equations (per cell): 

 dC/dz = - k_eff * (q/q0) * C       (steady-state plug flow; q = remaining capacity)
 dq/dt = - r * Q * C / V_cell        (scavenger depletion)
with stoichiometric ratio r (mol H2S per mol active sites, typical 1.0 for triazine, 0.5-0.7 for Fe2O3) and volumetric rate constant k_eff fitted to bed geometry.

Outputs the breakthrough curve C(t)/C_in at the bed outlet, the total H2S removed up to breakthrough, and the cumulative bed utilisation. Breakthrough is defined as the time at which outlet concentration first exceeds breakthroughFraction * C_in.

Standards informational: NACE TM0284 (sour service), API RP 945 (amine systems).

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

    Simulates the breakthrough curve and saturation history.

  • Constructor Details

    • PackedBedScavengerReactor

      public PackedBedScavengerReactor()
      Default constructor.

  • Method Details

    • setGeometry

      public PackedBedScavengerReactor setGeometry(double diameterM, double heightM, double voidage)
      Sets bed geometry.
      Parameters:
      diameterM - bed inner diameter [m]
      heightM - bed packed height [m]
      voidage - bed voidage (0..1)
      Returns:
      this for chaining

    • setMedia

      public PackedBedScavengerReactor setMedia(double loadingMolPerKg, double bulkDensityKgM3, double stoichiometricRatio)
      Sets scavenger media properties.
      Parameters:
      loadingMolPerKg - active site loading [mol/kg media]
      bulkDensityKgM3 - packed bulk density [kg/m3]
      stoichiometricRatio - mol H2S consumed per mol active site (~1.0 triazine, ~0.6 Fe2O3)
      Returns:
      this for chaining

    • setRateConstant

      public PackedBedScavengerReactor setRateConstant(double kPerS)
      Sets the volumetric reaction rate constant (lumped first-order in H2S) at fresh bed.
      Parameters:
      kPerS - rate constant [1/s], typical 1-50 for triazine, 0.1-5 for Fe oxide
      Returns:
      this for chaining

    • setFeed

      public PackedBedScavengerReactor setFeed(double cInletMolM3, double qM3PerS)
      Sets feed conditions.
      Parameters:
      cInletMolM3 - inlet H2S molar concentration [mol/m3]
      qM3PerS - volumetric flow rate [m3/s]
      Returns:
      this for chaining

    • setDiscretisation

      public PackedBedScavengerReactor setDiscretisation(int nCells, int nTimeSteps)
      Sets discretisation (axial cells, time steps).
      Parameters:
      nCells - number of axial cells (10..1000)
      nTimeSteps - number of time steps for breakthrough curve
      Returns:
      this for chaining

    • setSimulationTime

      public PackedBedScavengerReactor setSimulationTime(double simTimeS, double breakFrac)
      Sets simulation horizon and breakthrough threshold.
      Parameters:
      simTimeS - total simulated service time [s]
      breakFrac - outlet concentration fraction defining breakthrough (0..1)
      Returns:
      this for chaining

    • evaluate

      public PackedBedScavengerReactor evaluate()
      Simulates the breakthrough curve and saturation history.
      Returns:
      this for chaining

    • getTimeSeriesS

      public List<Double> getTimeSeriesS()
      Returns the simulated time series.
      Returns:
      list of times [s]

    • getOutletConcentrationProfile

      public List<Double> getOutletConcentrationProfile()
      Returns the outlet concentration history.
      Returns:
      list of outlet H2S concentrations [mol/m3]

    • getBedUtilisationProfile

      public List<Double> getBedUtilisationProfile()
      Returns the bed utilisation profile (fraction of capacity consumed at each time).
      Returns:
      list of utilisation fractions in [0,1]

    • getBreakthroughTimeS

      public double getBreakthroughTimeS()
      Returns the breakthrough time.
      Returns:
      breakthrough time [s]; positive infinity if no breakthrough within simulated horizon

    • getTotalH2sRemovedKg

      public double getTotalH2sRemovedKg()
      Returns the cumulative H2S mass removed.
      Returns:
      removed mass [kg]

    • getFinalBedUtilisation

      public double getFinalBedUtilisation()
      Returns the final bed utilisation at the end of simulation.
      Returns:
      utilisation fraction

    • isEvaluated

      public boolean isEvaluated()
      Returns true if evaluate() has been invoked.
      Returns:
      true if evaluated

      Returns standards used by this reactor model.
      Returns:
      list of standard reference maps
